hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'rm -rf'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'DROP DATABASE'*|*'--force'*|*'--no-verify'*) echo 'BLOCK: Dangerous operation detected' >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD -- 'docs/*.md' '.claude/rules/*.md' 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/,$//'); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "{\"stopReason\":\"Changed md files: $FILES — please verify readability and formatting consistency.\"}"; fi
